title: Rolson 52537 3 pc Chalk Line Set
features: Used for marking and attaining levels
Supplied with 4oz/13g clearly visible blue chalk, and line level
description: From the manufacturer About Us Rolson Tools continually look to bring you new innovative products, all at the very best possible margins and this year is no different. To date, we have over 250 new exciting and innovative products to whet your appetite, together with a host of new in-store packaging and point-of-sale material. All designed with impact and shelf appeal!. The Rolson marketing team have sought innovative ways to package our new and existing lines. We bring promotional product combinations that offer originality and a unique sales offering. Description Rolson Tools produces all of its products to an extremely high and diligent standard. All of our products come with the Rolson seal of approval allowing you to feel confident in the fact that your chosen product comes made to international standards, well presented in our branded packaging and extremely well-priced. Rolson Tools always aims to offer the most exciting and innovative products possible, without compromising on our values of quality and safety. Box Contains 1x Blue Chalk 1x Line level 1x Chalk Container
